summary: Taste Skill is an anti-slop frontend framework designed to enhance AI-generated interfaces with improved layout, typography, and motion. It provides a collection of portable agent skills for generating and implementing design elements, making it easier to create visually appealing UIs.
use_cases: Upgrading AI-generated web interfaces with better design
Generating reference images for branding and UI mockups
Auditing and redesigning existing projects for improved aesthetics
